data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a signature certificate with a full chain of custody.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for a signature certificate with a full chain of custody. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm the existence or implementation of such a certificate. The linked use case describes a multi-party sign-off workflow but lacks specific details or evidence regarding the signature certificate and its custody chain, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: Lack of evidence confirming the implementation of a signature certificate with a full chain of custody.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the signature certificate requirement.
